testcase.name: test_tc1_page_opens_successfully

error.message: failed on setup with "OSError: [Errno 8] Exec format error: '/Users/rinkuchoudhary/.wdm/drivers/chromedriver/mac64/146.0.7680.165/chromedriver-mac-arm64/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.chromedriver'"

testcase.error: tests/test_feedback_form.py:55: in driver drv = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options) venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/chrome/webdriver.py:45: in __init__ super().__init__( venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/chromium/webdriver.py:50: in __init__ self.service.start() venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/common/service.py:98: in start self._start_process(self._path) venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/common/service.py:208: in _start_process self.process = subprocess.Popen( /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.12/lib/python3.12/subprocess.py:1026: in __init__ self._execute_child(args, executable, preexec_fn, close_fds, /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.12/lib/python3.12/subprocess.py:1950: in _execute_child raise child_exception_type(errno_num, err_msg, err_filename) E OSError: [Errno 8] Exec format error: '/Users/rinkuchoudhary/.wdm/drivers/chromedriver/mac64/146.0.7680.165/chromedriver-mac-arm64/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.chromedriver'
